metadata.authority_note: Authoritative strategy/rules now live in AGENTS.md, MEMORY.md, docs/CONTRACT.md at repo root. This file is runtime environment state only.

project.name: voice_note
project.version_note: Contract v1.0 frozen after all 17 Stream A DoD items passed on 2026-07-20.
project.description: Contract-first CLI for voice recording + transcription via cloud Whisper providers (Groq, modelos). JSON/NDJSON contract v1.0 is shipped.

macos.notes: Uses PortAudio C bindings via PyAudio

linux.notes: parecord subprocess preferred over PyAudio on modern Linux

groq.language_format: English (full word — normalised to 'en' via langcodes)
groq.empirical_status: verified_working (2026-07-18, HTTP 200 in 0.84s, all fields populated)
groq.rationale: Native SDK preserves precise 429 wait-time parser

modelos.empirical_status: verified_working but quirky (2026-07-18): nulls 7/10 segment fields, end hallucination (30.19 on 2.28s audio), ignores word timestamp request
modelos.rationale: Self-hosted LiteLLM gateway on user-controlled infrastructure

fireworks.note: Never used in practice. Dead code removed 2026-07-20 (client file, .env.example entry, dispatcher choice). Do NOT re-add.

whisper_models._doc: Backwards-compat section. See providers.details.<name>.models for canonical list.

contract_status.current_stdout_surface: human TTY output plus pure JSON and streaming NDJSON machine modes
contract_status.current_exit_codes: structured symbolic codes with sysexits-aligned shell values; Ctrl+C is 130
contract_status.live_validation_status: passed 2026-07-20 for Groq JSON/NDJSON and modelos null/clamp paths

known_issues.description: Entire provider-abstraction layer + robust_recorder + strategy docs uncommitted. 6 modified + 12+ untracked files. Blocks Stream A.
No tests/ directory. Provider parsing unverified. Every refactor is unsafe.

Ctrl+C during recording can cause terminal corruption and file loss. PyAudio C extension blocks Python signal delivery. PortAudio modifies terminal settings. Nested exception handler creates signal shadow.
root_causes: PyAudio C extension blocks Python signal delivery
Nested exception handler creates signal shadow
known_issues.resolution: Stream D — apply recommendations from signal_handling_corruption_analysis.md

known_issues.description: Robust recorder (fault-tolerant, chunked) exists but is opt-in via --robust. Default is fragile in-RAM recorder. 15-month-old CRITICAL handoff open.
known_issues.resolution: Stream D — flip default to robust=True, add --legacy opt-in

known_issues.description: _parse_response uses float(getattr(seg, 'field', 0.0)) pattern. When attribute exists with null value, getattr returns null (not default), float(None) raises TypeError. Silence filter + low-confidence warnings non-functional on modelos.
known_issues.resolution: Stream A — replace with normaliser layer that preserves nulls per docs/CONTRACT.md §11.2

known_issues.description: src/api/fireworks_client.py (179 LOC) + FIREWORKS_API_KEY in .env.example + dispatcher entry. Never used.
known_issues.resolution: Removed 2026-07-20 — client file deleted, .env.example entry removed, dispatcher choice removed

known_issues.description: PipeWire + ALSA conflict on some Ubuntu 22.04 LTS systems
known_issues.workaround: Use parecord subprocess instead of PyAudio

known_issues.description: Clipboard write fails silently on headless systems

agent_registry._note: All agents predate the v1.0 master prompt split (2026-07-19). Each agent file has a 'defer to AGENTS.md' banner. Full resync deferred until Stream A starts.

audio-systems-architect.purpose: Diagnose recording failures, optimize backend selection (Stream D aligned)

robustness-engineer.purpose: Identify edge cases before releases (read-only analysis)

integration-mapper.purpose: Ensure compatibility with downstream tools (Stream F territory, deferred)
